Glad you’re here to see what I’m building

Hey, I'm Silverio.

Solution Architect · Tech Lead · Azure & AI Specialist

After 25 years in the trenches of software engineering, you start to see patterns. You realize that great architecture isn't about picking the shiniest framework or the fastest cloud provider; it’s about building bridges between cold logic and human purpose.

This blog is my "Digital Garden." It’s where my Obsidian notes, my deep dives into AI-driven workflows, and the scars earned as a Tech Lead finally converge.

Why now?

I’ve seen plenty of "next big things" come and go. But what we're witnessing today—the shift toward AI-native engineering and autonomous agents—is different. It’s not just a new tool in the belt; it’s a fundamental rewrite of how we think about solving problems.

I’m not interested in the hype. I’m interested in what actually works when you’re building at scale.

Let’s Work Together
